meta.name: Grandpa's Skins
meta.description: "Grandpa's Skins" is a short film that tells the story of Gabo, a 6-year-old boy, and his grandfather Ivan, who is in a state of dementia. With the tradition of the Kukers - where men wear huge leather suits to ward off evil forces - Gabo tries to bring back the memories of his grandfather and their relationship.
